chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2075 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 07.12.2022 None present for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant Attorney General. ----- Learned DAG has filed statement along with comments and documents stating that inquiry against the petitioner has been disclosed and this petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, in view of above, this petition is disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
